mapper.sql: id, rule_id, rule_name, severity, message, trigger_value, threshold_value, alert_time, notify_channels, notify_status, status, acknowledged_by, acknowledged_at, resolved_by, resolved_at, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_alert_event (rule_id, rule_name, severity, message, trigger_value, threshold_value, alert_time, notify_channels, notify_status, status) VALUES (#{ruleId}, #{ruleName}, #{severity}, #{message}, #{triggerValue}, #{thresholdValue}, #{alertTime}, #{notifyChannels}, #{notifyStatus}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_alert_event SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_alert_event WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} ORDER BY alert_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_alert_event WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY alert_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_alert_event WHERE severity = #{severity} ORDER BY alert_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_alert_event WHERE alert_time >= #{since} ORDER BY alert_time DESC
